text: Implement a reactive memory pattern using a reactive data structure (e.g., Redux or MobX) to track and manage the most critical program branches and their dependencies. This ensures that only the most relevant parts of the program are re-evaluated, reducing computational overhead and improving efficiency.
reason: Reactive memory prevents unnecessary re-evaluation of outdated branches, aligning with the importance scoring and minimizing resource usage, especially given the rapid progress in the sandbox and the need for zero API costs.
